---
title: "NDB"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-06"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(rvest)
library(readxl)
library(openxlsx)
```

```{r}
list.files("../xlsx/test/sec")
```


```{r}
df_test_1 <-  read.xlsx("../xlsx/test/sec/000821451.xlsx",
                        sheet = 3,
                        startRow = 1,
                        rows = c(1:5),
                                           fillMergedCells = FALSE,
                        skipEmptyRows = TRUE)
```


```{r}
df_test_1 <- df_test_1[7:ncol(df_test_1)]
```

```{r}
df_test_1 <- df_test_1  %>%
  mutate(INDEX = c("PRF", "SEC_code", "SEC_name")) %>%
  relocate(INDEX, .before = "X7")
```


```{r}
df_long <- df_test_1 %>%
  pivot_longer(!INDEX)
```

```{r}
# split

df_prf_long <- df_long %>%
  filter(INDEX == "PRF") %>%
  fill(value, .direction = "down") %>%
  rename(PRF = "value")
```

```{r}
df_sec_long <- df_prf_long %>%
  left_join(df_long %>% filter(INDEX == "SEC_code") %>% select(name, value),
            by = join_by("name")) %>%
  rename(SEC_code = "value") %>%
  left_join(df_long %>% filter(INDEX == "SEC_name") %>% select(name, value),
            by = join_by("name")) %>%
  rename(SEC_name = "value")
```

```{r}
df_sec_long %>% filter(str_detect(PRF, "二次医療圏") & 
                         str_detect(PRF, "判別不可")) 
```



```{r}
# add 48 to unkown sector

df_sec_long <- df_sec_long %>%
  mutate(PRF = case_when(str_detect(PRF, "二次医療圏") & 
                         str_detect(PRF, "判別不可") ~ paste("48", PRF),
         .default = PRF))
```


```{r}
# make unique names for colnames

df_sec_long <- df_sec_long %>%
  mutate(COL = paste(PRF, SEC_code, SEC_name)) %>%
  mutate(COL = str_replace_all(COL, "\\s", "_"))
```

```{r}
new_colnames <- df_sec_long$COL

head(new_colnames)

tail(new_colnames)
```


```{r}
# function for getting sector names

get_sec_colnames_add_1 <- function(xlsx_path){
  
  sheet_name <- getSheetNames(xlsx_path)
  
  sheet_name <- sheet_name[str_detect(sheet_name, "加算")]
  
  # read excel sheet
  list_df_col <- map2(xlsx_path,
                    sheet_name,
                    function(x, y){
                      read.xlsx(x,
                      sheet = y,
                      startRow = 1,
                      rows = c(1:5),
                      fillMergedCells = FALSE,
                      skipEmptyRows = TRUE)}
                    )
  
  # only keep columns with medical sector names
  list_df_col <- map(list_df_col,
                     function(x){
                       x <- x[9:ncol(x)]
                     })
  
  # create "INDEX" for each row and convert to long format
  list_df_col_long <- map(list_df_col,
                     function(x){
                       x %>%
                         mutate(INDEX = c("PRF", "SEC_code", "SEC_name")) %>%
                         relocate(INDEX, .before = "X9") %>%
                         pivot_longer(!INDEX)
                     })
  
  list_df_col_prf <- map(list_df_col_long,
                          function(x) {
                            x %>%
                              filter(INDEX == "PRF") %>%
                              fill(value, .direction = "down") %>%
                              rename(PRF = "value")
                            })
  
  list_df_col_join <- map2(list_df_col_prf,
                           list_df_col_long,
                           function(x, y) {
                            x %>%
                              left_join(y %>%
                                          filter(INDEX == "SEC_code") %>%
                                          select(name, value),
                                        by = join_by("name")) %>%
                               rename(SEC_code = "value") %>%
                               left_join(y %>%
                                           filter(INDEX == "SEC_name") %>%
                                           select(name, value),
                                         by = join_by("name")) %>%
                               rename(SEC_name = "value")
                          })
  
  
  list_colnames <- map(list_df_col_join,
                           function(x){
                             x %>%
                               mutate(PRF = case_when(str_detect(PRF, "二次医療圏") & 
                         str_detect(PRF, "判別不可") ~ paste("48", PRF),
                         .default = PRF)) %>%
                               mutate(COL = paste(PRF, SEC_code, SEC_name)) %>%
                               mutate(COL = str_replace_all(COL, "\\s", "_")) %>%
                               pull(COL)
                           })
  
  list_colnames <- map(list_colnames, function(x){
    c("ADD", "x2", "x3",
                       "PRO_code", "PRO_name",
                       "POINT", "PCT", "TOTAL",
      x)
  })
  
  return(list_colnames)
  }
                        
```


```{r}
ex_col <- get_sec_colnames_add_1("../xlsx/test/sec/000821451.xlsx")
```


```{r}
ex_col[[1]] %>% length()
```


```{r}
setdiff(ex_col[[1]], ex_col[[2]])
setdiff(ex_col[[2]], ex_col[[1]])
```

```{r}
tail(ex_col[[1]])

tail(ex_col[[2]])
```


```{r}
df_sec_long %>% pivot_wider(names_from = COL, values_from = SEC_code)
```


# read first two files

```{r}
get_data_sec_add_1 <- function(xlsx_path){
  
  sheet_name <- getSheetNames(xlsx_path)
  
  sheet_name <- sheet_name[str_detect(sheet_name, "加算")]
  
  # read excel sheet
  list_df <- map2(xlsx_path,
                  sheet_name,
                  function(x, y) read.xlsx(x,
                                           sheet = y,
                                           startRow = 5,
                                           skipEmptyCols = FALSE,
                                           fillMergedCells = FALSE) %>%
                    return())

    # clean colnames
  list_colnames <- get_sec_colnames_add_1(xlsx_path)

  # update colnames
  list_df <- map2(list_df, list_colnames,
                 function(x, y){
                   colnames(x) <- y
                   return(x)})
  
  
  # remove x2 and x3
  list_df <- map(list_df,
                 function(x){
                   x %>% select(!c(x2, x3)) %>% return()
                 })
  
  # add file name
  list_df <- map(list_df,
                 function(x){
                   x %>% 
                     mutate(FILE = xlsx_path) %>%
                     mutate(FILE = str_extract(FILE, "(?<=\\/)00[:digit:]+(?=\\.xlsx)")) %>%
                     relocate(FILE, .before = "ADD")  
                 })

  # add sheet name and do one hot coding for sheet
  # "注射薬 外来 (院内)" "注射薬 外来 (院外)" "注射薬 入院"  
  list_df <- map2(list_df, sheet_name,
                 function(x, y){
                   x %>% 
                     mutate(SHEET_jp = y) %>%
                         mutate(SHEET = case_when(
                           str_detect(SHEET_jp, "全体") ~ "all",
                           str_detect(SHEET_jp, "外来")　&
                             !str_detect(SHEET_jp, "加算")~ "outpt",
                           str_detect(SHEET_jp, "外来")　&
                             str_detect(SHEET_jp, "加算")~ "outpt_add",
                           str_detect(SHEET_jp, "入院") &
                             !str_detect(SHEET_jp, "加算") ~ "inpt",
                           str_detect(SHEET_jp, "入院") &
                             str_detect(SHEET_jp, "加算") ~ "input_add"))    %>%
                     relocate(SHEET, .after = "FILE")
                   })
  
  # fill missing cells
  
  list_df <- map(list_df,
                 function(x){
                   x %>% 
                     tidyr::fill(starts_with("ADD"), .direction = "down") %>%
                     mutate(across(everything(), as.character))
                 })
  
  
     # process year
  
  # function for converting year into Western year
  convert_year <- function(x){
  if (str_detect(x, "^H")){
    y <- x %>% str_remove("^H") %>% as.numeric()
    y <- y + 1988
    return(as.character(y))
  }
  else if (str_detect(x, "^R")){
    y <- x %>% str_remove("^R") %>% as.numeric()
    y <- y + 2018
    return(as.character(y))
  }
  else{
    return(x)
  }
}
  
  # get year
  get_year <- function(x, y){
  read.xlsx(x, sheet = y, startRow =1 , colNames = FALSE, rows = 1) %>% 
    rename(DES_jp = "X1") %>%
    mutate(FILE = x) %>%
    mutate(FILE = str_extract(FILE, "(?<=\\/)00[:digit:]+(?=\\.xlsx)")) %>%
    mutate(DES_jp = str_remove(DES_jp, "　※.+") )  %>%
    mutate(DES_jp = str_remove(DES_jp, "診療年月："))　%>%
    mutate(YEAR_str = str_extract(DES_jp, "[^年]+(?=年)")) %>%
    mutate(YEAR_end = str_extract(DES_jp, "(?<=～)[^年]+(?=年)")) %>%
    mutate(YEAR_str = convert_year(YEAR_str)) %>%
    mutate(YEAR_end = convert_year(YEAR_end))
    }
  
  # apply get_year function
  list_year <- map2(xlsx_path,
                     sheet_name, get_year)
    
  list_df <- map2(list_df, list_year, function(x, y){
    x %>% left_join(y, by = join_by(FILE == FILE))
  })
  
  
  # combine
  df <- list_df %>% list_rbind()
  
  return(df)

  }
```

# need to read different folders

```{r}
df_1 <- read.xlsx("../xlsx/test/sec/000821451.xlsx")
```



```{r}
# for each folider, read the first two files, parse , combine and save
# x is the overall folder name (ext inj)
# y is the individual folder (reg sec)

save_df_sec_add_1 <- function(x, y){
  xlsx <- list.files(paste0("../xlsx/", x, "/", y))
  
  xlsx <- xlsx[1]

  from <- paste0("../xlsx/", x, "/", y, "/", xlsx)
  
  df <- map(from, get_data_sec_add_1) %>% list_rbind()
  
  # add category
  df <- df %>% 
    mutate(TYPE = x) %>%
    relocate(TYPE, .after = "FILE") %>%
    mutate(CAT = y) %>%
    relocate(CAT, .after = "TYPE")
  
  saveRDS(df, paste0("../rds/", x, "/", y,"/", "df_", x, "_", y, "_add_1"))
}
```

```{r}
 list.files(paste0("../xlsx/", "test", "/", "sec"))
```


```{r}
save_df_sec_add_1("test", "sec")
```

```{r}
df_test_sec_add_1 <- readRDS("../rds/test/sec/df_test_sec_add_1")
```

# prasing file 2-5

```{r}
# function for getting sector names

get_sec_colnames_add_2 <- function(xlsx_path){
  
  sheet_name <- getSheetNames(xlsx_path)
  
  sheet_name <- sheet_name[!str_detect(sheet_name, "加算")]
  
  # read excel sheet
  list_df_col <- map2(xlsx_path,
                    sheet_name,
                    function(x, y){
                      read.xlsx(x,
                      sheet = y,
                      startRow = 2,
                      rows = c(2:6),
                      fillMergedCells = FALSE,
                      skipEmptyRows = TRUE)}
                    )
  
  # only keep columns with medical sector names
  list_df_col <- map(list_df_col,
                     function(x){
                       x <- x[9:ncol(x)]
                     })
  
  # create "INDEX" for each row and convert to long format
  list_df_col_long <- map(list_df_col,
                     function(x){
                       x %>%
                         mutate(INDEX = c("PRF", "SEC_code", "SEC_name")) %>%
                         relocate(INDEX, .before = "X9") %>%
                         pivot_longer(!INDEX)
                     })
  
  list_df_col_prf <- map(list_df_col_long,
                          function(x) {
                            x %>%
                              filter(INDEX == "PRF") %>%
                              fill(value, .direction = "down") %>%
                              rename(PRF = "value")
                            })
  
  list_df_col_join <- map2(list_df_col_prf,
                           list_df_col_long,
                           function(x, y) {
                            x %>%
                              left_join(y %>%
                                          filter(INDEX == "SEC_code") %>%
                                          select(name, value),
                                        by = join_by("name")) %>%
                               rename(SEC_code = "value") %>%
                               left_join(y %>%
                                           filter(INDEX == "SEC_name") %>%
                                           select(name, value),
                                         by = join_by("name")) %>%
                               rename(SEC_name = "value")
                          })
  
  
  list_colnames <- map(list_df_col_join,
                           function(x){
                             x %>%
                               mutate(PRF = case_when(str_detect(PRF, "二次医療圏") & 
                         str_detect(PRF, "判別不可") ~ paste("48", PRF),
                         .default = PRF)) %>%
                               mutate(COL = paste(PRF, SEC_code, SEC_name)) %>%
                               mutate(COL = str_replace_all(COL, "\\s", "_")) %>%
                               pull(COL)
                           })
  
   
  list_colnames <- map(list_colnames, function(x){
    c("ADD", "x2", "x3",
                       "PRO_code", "PRO_name",
                       "POINT", "PCT", "TOTAL",
      x)
  })
  
  return(list_colnames)
  }
                        
```

```{r}
col2 <- get_sec_colnames_add_2("../xlsx/test/sec/001122099.xlsx")
```


```{r}
get_data_sec_add_2 <- function(xlsx_path){
  
  sheet_name <- getSheetNames(xlsx_path)
  
  sheet_name <- sheet_name[!str_detect(sheet_name, "加算")]
  
  # read excel sheet
  list_df <- map2(xlsx_path,
                  sheet_name,
                  function(x, y){
                    read.xlsx(x,
                              sheet = y,
                              startRow = 6,
                              fillMergedCells = FALSE) %>%
                    return()}) 
  
  
  # get colnames
  list_colnames <- get_sec_colnames_add_2(xlsx_path)

  
  #add first seven columns 

  list_df <- map2(list_df, list_colnames,
                 function(x, y){
                   colnames(x) <- y
                   return(x)})
  
  # add file name

  list_df <- map(list_df,
                 function(x){
                   x %>% 
                     mutate(FILE = xlsx_path) %>%
                     mutate(FILE = str_extract(FILE, "(?<=\\/)00[:digit:]+(?=\\.xlsx)")) %>%
                     relocate(FILE, .before = "ADD")  
                 })

  # add sheet name and do one hot coding for sheet
  # "全体"
  # "外来"         "外来（加算）" "入院"         "入院（加算）"
  list_df <- map2(list_df, sheet_name,
                 function(x, y){
                   x %>% 
                     mutate(SHEET_jp = y) %>%
                         mutate(SHEET = case_when(
                           str_detect(SHEET_jp, "全体") ~ "all",
                           str_detect(SHEET_jp, "外来")　&
                             !str_detect(SHEET_jp, "加算")~ "outpt",
                           str_detect(SHEET_jp, "外来")　&
                             str_detect(SHEET_jp, "加算")~ "outpt_ex",
                           str_detect(SHEET_jp, "入院") &
                             !str_detect(SHEET_jp, "加算") ~ "inpt",
                           str_detect(SHEET_jp, "入院") &
                             str_detect(SHEET_jp, "加算") ~ "input_ex"))    %>%
                     relocate(SHEET, .after = "FILE")
                   })
  
  # fill missing cells
    list_df <- map(list_df,
                 function(x){
                   x %>% 
                     tidyr::fill(starts_with("ADD"), .direction = "down") %>%
                     mutate(across(everything(), as.character))
                 })
  
  # process year
  # function for converting year into Western year
  convert_year <- function(x){
    if (str_detect(x, "^H")){
      y <- x %>% str_remove("^H") %>% as.numeric()
      y <- y + 1988
      return(as.character(y))
      }
    else if (str_detect(x, "^R")){
      y <- x %>% str_remove("^R") %>% as.numeric()
      y <- y + 2018
      return(as.character(y))
      }
    else{
      return(x)
      }
    }
  
  # get year
  get_year <- function(x, y){
  read.xlsx(x, sheet = y, startRow =1 , colNames = FALSE, rows = 1) %>% 
    rename(DES_jp = "X1") %>%
    mutate(FILE = x) %>%
    mutate(FILE = str_extract(FILE, "(?<=\\/)00[:digit:]+(?=\\.xlsx)")) %>%
    mutate(DES_jp = str_remove(DES_jp, "　※.+") )  %>%
    mutate(DES_jp = str_remove(DES_jp, "診療年月："))　%>%
    mutate(YEAR_str = str_extract(DES_jp, "[^年]+(?=年)")) %>%
    mutate(YEAR_end = str_extract(DES_jp, "(?<=～)[^年]+(?=年)")) %>%
    mutate(YEAR_str = convert_year(YEAR_str)) %>%
    mutate(YEAR_end = convert_year(YEAR_end))
    }
  
  list_year <- map2(xlsx_path,
                     sheet_name, get_year)
    
  list_df <- map2(list_df, list_year, function(x, y){
    x %>% left_join(y, by = join_by(FILE == FILE))
  })
  
  # combine
  df <- list_df %>% list_rbind()
  
  return(df)

  }
```


```{r}
# for each folider, read the first two files, parse , combine and save
# x is the overall folder name (ext inj)
# y is the individual folder (reg sec)

save_df_sec_add_2 <- function(x, y){
  xlsx <- list.files(paste0("../xlsx/", x, "/", y))
  
  xlsx <- xlsx[2:length(xlsx)]

  from <- paste0("../xlsx/", x, "/", y, "/", xlsx)
  
  df <- map(from, get_data_sec_add_2) %>% list_rbind()
  
  # add category
  df <- df %>% 
    mutate(TYPE = x) %>%
    relocate(TYPE, .after = "FILE") %>%
    mutate(CAT = y) %>%
    relocate(CAT, .after = "TYPE")
  
  saveRDS(df, paste0("../rds/", x, "/", y,"/", "df_", x, "_", y, "_add_2"))
}
```

```{r}
save_df_sec_add_2("test", "sec")
```

```{r}
df_test_sec_add_2 <- readRDS("../rds/test/sec/df_test_sec_add_2")
```

# inj

```{r}
save_df_sec_add_1("inj", "sec")

save_df_sec_add_2("inj", "sec")
```


```{r}
df_inj_sec_add_1 <- readRDS("../rds/inj/sec/df_inj_sec_add_1")

df_inj_sec_add_2 <- readRDS("../rds/inj/sec/df_inj_sec_add_2")
```


```{r}
df_inj_sec_add_1 %>% bind_rows(df_inj_sec_add_2) %>%
   saveRDS("../rds/inj/sec/df_inj_sec_add")
```

```{r}
df_inj_sec_add <- readRDS("../rds/inj/sec/df_inj_sec_add")
```
